ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft round */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended before joining the professional league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the baseball team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team competes in */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the current team manager */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the statistics are for */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Number of innings pitched */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "earned_run_average" REAL /* Player's earned run average */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Player's batting average */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs hit by the player */,
  "runs_batted_in" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in by the player */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks taken by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary for the contract period */,
  "performance_bonuses" TEXT /* Details of performance bonuses */,
  "injury_clauses" TEXT /* Details of injury clauses */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., Major League, Minor League) */,
  "option_years" TEXT /* Details of any option years in the contract */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Specific performance metrics tied to bonuses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_records" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "date_of_injury" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "estimated_recovery_time" TEXT /* Estimated recovery time */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle, ligament) */,
  "recovery_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player started recovery */,
  "recovery_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player is expected to return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_records_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game for the player's team */,
  "player_stats" TEXT /* Individual statistics for the player in the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "inning_played" INTEGER /* Number of innings the player participated in */,
  "batting_position" INTEGER /* Batting position of the player in the lineup */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats by the player in the game */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player in the game */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the player in the game */,
  "runs_batted_in" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in by the player in the game */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks taken by the player in the game */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year_received" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., pitching, hitting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, signing) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the transaction */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player was traded from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player was traded to */,
  "transaction_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, player) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player whose data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the season belongs to */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoffs_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoffs_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)
